'''tawuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:leadlight|leadlight]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-w-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:leadlight|leadlight]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| tawuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæwirith|tæwirith]] || [[word:tæwirij|tæwirij]] || [[word:tæwirish|tæwirish]] || [[word:tæwiri|tæwiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:tawuwuruth|tawuwuruth]] || [[word:tawuwuruj|tawuwuruj]] || [[word:tawuwurush|tawuwurush]] || [[word:tawuwuru|tawuwuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:tawuruth|tawuruth]] || [[word:tawuruj|tawuruj]] || [[word:tawurush|tawurush]] || [[word:tawuru|tawuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:tawufruth|tawufruth]] || [[word:tawufruj|tawufruj]] || [[word:tawufrush|tawufrush]] || [[word:tawufruf|tawufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tawuruthu|tawuruthu]] || [[word:tawuruju|tawuruju]] || [[word:tawurushu|tawurushu]] || [[word:tawuruku|tawuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tawuruth|tawuruth]] || [[word:tawuruj|tawuruj]] || [[word:tawurush|tawurush]] || [[word:tawuru|tawuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tawuruthul|tawuruthul]] || [[word:tawurujul|tawurujul]] || [[word:tawurushul|tawurushul]] || [[word:tawurukul|tawurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tawuruthuthu|tawuruthuthu]] || [[word:tawurujuju|tawurujuju]] || [[word:tawurushushu|tawurushushu]] || [[word:tawuruku|tawuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tawuruthun|tawuruthun]] || [[word:tawurujun|tawurujun]] || [[word:tawurushun|tawurushun]] || [[word:tawurukun|tawurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tawuruthuoro|tawuruthuoro]] || [[word:tawurujuoro|tawurujuoro]] || [[word:tawurushuoro|tawurushuoro]] || [[word:tawurukuoro|tawurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|06f9dc6}}
